ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT JUNYING YU'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-24-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF GIGI ELLIS' MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. THE ANSWER AS PLED STATES SUFFICIENT FACTS TO CONSTITUTE A DEFENSE. DEFENDANT SUFFICIENTLY DENIED PLAINTIFF'S OWNERSHIP IN THE PROPERTY AND ALLEGED, BY ADMITTING FACTS PLED IN THE COMPLAINT, DEFENDANT'S OWNERSHIP IN THE PROPERTY. FURTHERMORE, JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE RECORDED DOCUMENTS DOES NOT ESTABLISH THAT DEUTSCHE BANK WAS NOT THE BENEFICIARY AT THE TIME OF THE FORECLOSURE SALE OR THAT DEFENDANT DOES NOT HAVE TITLE TO THE PROPERTY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT JUNYING YU'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT EXIST AS TO WHETHER THE NONJUDICIAL FORECLOSURE SALE AND SUBSEQUENT DEED OF TRUST EXECUTED BY J.P. MORGAN CHASE LAWFULLY DIVESTED PLAINTIFF OF TITLE IN THE PROPERTY. (SEE PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED AMENDED RESPONSIVE SEPARATE STATEMENT 4, 5.) DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO PRESENT EVIDENCE CONTROVERTING PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO TITLE AS A MATTER OF LAW. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976

Defendant Junying Yu'S Motion For Summary Judgment Per The Order Of The Presiding Judge.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTTY. GEORGE S. WYNN, TEL. NO. 279-7397 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. SUZETTE Z. TORRES OF THE FIDELITY NATIONAL GROUP, TEL. NO. (925)817-3704 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. Defendant Junying Yu'S Motion For Summary Judgment is denied. Triable issues of material fact exist as to whether the nonjudicial foreclosure sale and subsequent deed of trust executed by J.P. Morgan Chase lawfully divested Plaintiff of title in the property. (See Plaintiff's Proposed Amended Responsive Separate Statement 4, 5.) Defendant has failed to present evidence controverting Plaintiff's claim to title as a matter of law. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg

Plaintiff Gigi Ellis' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Sep-24-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTTY. GEORGE S. WYNN, TEL. NO. 279-7397 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. SUZETTE Z. TORRES OF THE FIDELITY NATIONAL GROUP, TEL. NO. (925)817-3704 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE ON THE RECORD TO ALLOW MS. TORRES TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE BECAUSE SHE INFORMED THE COURT BY WAY OF E-MAIL THAT NO PROPER NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO HER TO CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Gigi Ellis' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is denied. The Answer as pled states sufficient facts to constitute a defense. Defendant sufficiently denied Plaintiff's ownership in the property and alleged, by admitting facts pled in the Complaint, Defendant's ownership in the property. Furthermore, judicial notice of the recorded documents does not establish that Deutsche Bank was not the beneficiary at the time of the foreclosure sale or that Defendant does not have title to the property. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
